notice.seo_title: Legal Notice | Gelabert Homes Real Estate
notice.title: Legal Notice

section1.title: 1. General Information
section1.content: In compliance with the information obligation set out in Article 10 of Law 34/2002, of July 11, on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI-CE), the following data is provided:
section1.address_val: Malaga & Costa del Sol (Online Real Estate)

section2.title: 2. Conditions of Use
section2.content: Access and use of this website attribute the status of USER, who accepts, from said access and/or use, the General Conditions of Use reflected here.

section3.title: 3. Intellectual Property
section3.content: GELABERT HOMES REAL ESTATE, on its own behalf or as an assignee, is the owner of all intellectual and industrial property rights of its website, as well as the elements contained therein (images, sound, audio, video, software, or texts; trademarks or logos, color combinations, structure, and design).

section4.title: 4. Exclusion of Liability
section4.content: The owner is not responsible, in any case, for damages of any nature that may be caused by, but not limited to: errors or omissions in the content, lack of availability of the portal, or the transmission of viruses or malicious or harmful programs in the content, despite having adopted all the necessary technological measures to prevent it.

privacy.seo_title: Privacy Policy | Gelabert Homes Real Estate
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

section1.title: 1. Data Controller
section1.content: GELABERT HOMES REAL ESTATE informs data subjects that their personal data will be treated in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and Organic Law 3/2018 (LOPDGDD).
section1.purpose_val: Management of real estate inquiries, services for owners, tenants, and housing seekers.

section2.title: 2. Data Collected
section2.content: Through our forms we collect: name, email, telephone, and details of the property or inquiry. The treatment of this data is based on the consent of the data subject by checking the acceptance box.

section3.title: 3. User Rights
section3.content: Any person has the right to obtain confirmation as to whether we are processing their data. Data subjects have the right to:
rights: Request the rectification of inaccurate data.
Request its deletion when it is no longer necessary.
Object to the processing of their data.
section3.exercise: To exercise these rights, send an email to info@gelaberthomes.es attaching a copy of your ID.

section4.title: 4. Data Retention
section4.content: Data will be kept as long as the commercial relationship is maintained or for the years necessary to comply with legal obligations.

cookies.seo_title: Cookie Policy | Gelabert Homes Real Estate
cookies.title: Cookie Policy

section1.title: What are cookies?
section1.content: A cookie is a small file that is downloaded to your computer when accessing certain websites. Cookies allow a website, among other things, to store and retrieve information about the browsing habits of a user or their equipment.

section2.title: Cookies used on this site
section2.content: This website uses the following cookies:

technical.title: Technical Cookies:
technical.content: These are those that allow the user to navigate through a website and use the different options or services that exist in it.

analysis.title: Analysis Cookies:
analysis.content: These are those that, processed by us or by third parties (such as Google Analytics), allow us to quantify the number of users and carry out the measurement and statistical analysis of the use made by users of the service offered.

section3.title: How to disable cookies
section3.content: You can allow, block, or delete cookies installed on your computer by configuring the options of the browser installed on your computer.

cookie_banner.title: Your privacy matters to us
cookie_banner.description: We use our own and third-party cookies to improve your browsing experience, offer you content tailored to your interests, and perform analytical work. You can accept all cookies or configure your preferences. See our <1>Cookie Policy</1>.
